garment_images.description: Garment reference images to fit onto the person. Each entry is an HTTP(S) URL or a base64 data URI. Up to 6 recommended, up to 11 supported.

output_format.description: Format of the saved output image.

output_quality.description: Quality for jpg/webp outputs, from 0 to 100.

person_image.description: Image of the person to dress. A publicly reachable HTTP(S) URL or a base64 data URI (data:image/...;base64,...).

preserve_input_size.description: Return the output at the original input resolution.

prompt.description: Experimental guidance for non-flatlay garment images, e.g. which garment from which image to use.

reference_pose.description: Optional reference pose image (HTTP(S) URL or data URI). When provided, the person is reposed to match this reference before virtual try-on.

seed.description: Random seed. Leave unset for a random seed.

turbo.description: Run faster with additional optimizations. Not recommended for more than 4 garments.
